prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 北京航空航天大学为985、211、双一流高校；软科中国大学排名持续上升，2021年第15名→2023年第14名→2024年第12名→2025年第11名→2026年第11名，稳居全国顶尖高校前列；2026年声誉评价为「明显负面」，主要因杨昀导师师德失范与学术不端事件引发舆论关注，可能对部分考生报考心理产生负面影响；抖音热度排名第56位（较热），整体曝光度中等偏上；历史未见明显投档断档记录；拥有A+学科7个（仪器科学与技术、材料科学与工程、生物医学工程、管理科学与工程、航空宇航科学与技术、计算机科学与技术、软件工程），A及A-学科9个，共16个A-以上学科，学科实力极强，对高分考生吸引力大。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程等北航核心招生专业持续高热推荐，社会关注度高；陕西省2026年物理类考生约20.65万人，较2025年17.25万人增加约19.7%，考生规模显著扩大，竞争加剧；北航位于北京，属一线城市高校，对陕西考生有较强地域吸引力。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次671名、2026年大幅扩招16%（使位次后移）、物理类考生增加约19.7%（使位次前移）、声誉负面事件（可能使位次后移）等多重因素。扩招效应与考生增加效应大致对冲，声誉负面影响有限，故预测最低位次约735名，区间651–819名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for science (physics category) were approximately 661, 708, 658, 957, and 671 respectively. In 2024, there was an abnormal jump to 957, followed by a rapid decline to 671 in 2025. Overall, the past five years show significant fluctuations but no clear single-direction trend; the baseline ranking for 2025 is approximately 671. The enrollment plan for this university in Shaanxi's science (physics category) from 2021 to 2025 was 103, 103, 101, 101, and 100 students respectively, showing a slight decrease. In 2026, the plan significantly increases to 116 students, an expansion of 16% compared to 2025. This substantial expansion will increase enrollment slots, easing competitive pressure and causing the ranking number to increase.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Beihang University is a 985, 211, and Double First-Class university. Its ranking in the Shanghai Ranking's Chinese University Rankings has been continuously rising: 15th in 2021, 14th in 2023, 12th in 2024, 11th in 2025, and 11th in 2026, firmly among the top universities in China. In 2026, its reputation evaluation is 'significantly negative', mainly due to the teacher Yang Yun's ethical misconduct and academic fraud incident, which has attracted public attention and may negatively affect some candidates' application psychology. Its Douyin popularity ranking is 56th (relatively hot), with overall exposure above average. Historically, there have been no obvious records of admission cut-off drops. It has 7 A+ disciplines (Instrument Science and Technology, Materials Science and Engineering, Biomedical Engineering, Management Science and Engineering, Aeronautical and Astronautical Science and Technology, Computer Science and Technology, Software Engineering), 9 A and A- disciplines, totaling 16 disciplines rated A- or above. Its disciplinary strength is extremely strong, attracting high-scoring candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Core enrollment majors at Beihang, such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering, continue to be highly recommended with high social attention. In 2026, the number of physics category candidates in Shaanxi is approximately 206,500, an increase of about 19.7% from 172,500 in 2025, significantly expanding the candidate pool and intensifying competition. Beihang is located in Beijing, a first-tier city university, which has a strong regional appeal to Shaanxi candidates.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering multiple factors including the baseline ranking of 671 in 2025, a significant 16% enrollment expansion in 2026 (which shifts the ranking backward), an approximately 19.7% increase in physics category candidates (which shifts the ranking forward), and the negative reputation incident (which may shift the ranking backward). The expansion effect and the candidate increase effect roughly offset each other, and the negative reputation impact is limited. Therefore, the predicted minimum ranking is approximately 735, with a range of 651 to 819.

- Artificial Intelligence (Excellent Talent Training Pilot Class).

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For rankings within the predicted range of 651 to 819, it is recommended to primarily apply for Tier 2 majors, with Tier 1 majors as reach options and Tier 3 majors as safety options. If the ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (e.g., within 650), focus on reaching for Tier 1 flagship majors such as Computer Top-Notch Program and Future Aerospace Leading Program. If the ranking is close to the upper limit of the range (e.g., outside 800), prioritize Tier 3 majors like Aerospace and Aviation and Science Pilot Classes to ensure admission.

学校层次与声誉.text: 985, 211, Double First-Class; ranked 11th nationally in the Soft Science Ranking (2026), firmly among the top universities; the 2026 reputation evaluation is 'clearly negative', mainly due to the teacher ethics misconduct incident involving mentor Yang Yun, which may have a certain negative impact on some candidates' application psychology; Douyin popularity ranking 56th (relatively hot), overall attention moderate; Beihang's liberal arts enrollment majors are Social Science Experimental Class (Economics, Administrative Management, Law), with corresponding discipline evaluations: Foreign Language and Literature A, Law not independently rated (Beihang Law is not a strong discipline); overall liberal arts strength is less prominent than science and engineering.
